scripts.test:admin: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:admin && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:admin && playwright test e2e/admin/admin.spec.js
scripts.test:auth: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:auth && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:auth
scripts.test:books: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:books && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:books && playwright test e2e/books/books.spec.js
scripts.test:communications: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:communications && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:communications && playwright test e2e/communications/communications.spec.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm.cmd --prefix backend run coverage && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run coverage
scripts.test:coverage:critical: npm.cmd --prefix backend run coverage:critical && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run coverage:critical
scripts.test:engagement: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:engagement && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:engagement && playwright test e2e/engagement/engagement.spec.js
scripts.test:author: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:author && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:author && playwright test e2e/author/author.spec.js
scripts.test:permissions: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:permissions && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:permissions
scripts.test:public: npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:public && playwright test e2e/public/public.spec.js
scripts.test:reader: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:reader && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:reader && playwright test e2e/reader/reader.spec.js
scripts.test:demo-data: npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:demo-data && playwright test e2e/demo/demo-data.spec.js
scripts.test:smoke: node scripts/qa/check-local-origin.mjs && npm.cmd --prefix backend run test:smoke && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:smoke && playwright test e2e/smoke/smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:ui-actions: npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test:ui && playwright test e2e/ui/ui-actions.spec.js
